raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box (on table center)",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms have clear lateral access to the left and right faces of the darker box, with enough clearance from the table surface and no nearby fragile/loose objects that could be bumped during alignment.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is constrained from both sides and prevented from sliding while the grippers align for a secure lift."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "darker box (on table center)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The box is stabilized; each end-effector is aligned to opposing side faces at mid-height; sufficient friction/contact area is available to hold the 30x30x30 cm box without using the claw.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely held between both end-effectors and lifted clear of the tabletop surface."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms have clear lateral access to the left and right faces of the darker box, with enough clearance from the table surface and no nearby fragile/loose objects that could be bumped during alignment.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is constrained from both sides and prevented from sliding while the grippers align for a secure lift.

parsed_json.Precondition: The box is stabilized; each end-effector is aligned to opposing side faces at mid-height; sufficient friction/contact area is available to hold the 30x30x30 cm box without using the claw.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held between both end-effectors and lifted clear of the tabletop surface.
